deliberate_omissions: Design flow beyond the read-only dashboard

brief.rationale: The objective, users, scope, and selected domain context are present; delivery/governance detail remains pending.

prd.rationale: The PRD has enough confirmed evidence for problem, personas, and functional requirements; detailed KPI source/method remains pending.

anchors.rationale: IMP-058 propagates per-story read_plan anchors into execution_contract and implementation_readiness.json.

context.rationale: IMP-057 retrieves context per story so technology/design/quality signals can differ by Spec Unit.

backlog.rationale: IMP-048 must derive one value story per confirmed Spec Unit instead of the previous fixed five-story seed.

backlog_refinement.rationale: IMP-059 validates an agentic backlog refinement with verbatim local citations and renders it as origin agent.

golden_queries.query: what metric measures operations preparation improvement
golden_queries.rationale: The requirement states the 30 percent preparation reduction metric.
